Title: Writing Overview
Summary: Explorations in software engineering, distributed systems, and development practices.
Highlights: On Distributed Consensus — An exploration of the Raft and Paxos consensus algorithms and their role in distributed systems.
Why I Switched from React to Vue — A personal take on the Vue vs React debate, covering developer experience, ecosystem, and productivity.
A Practical Guide to CI/CD for Solo Developers — Setting up GitHub Actions, automated testing, and deployment pipelines for one-person teams.
